content: I was at home when Anjali called me at 10:48 PM, crying. She said she’d been raped. I called the police immediately. I’ve known Anjali for three years. She’s a straight-A student, never reckless. Earlier that day, around 6 PM, she was gardening in the complex garden and scratched her left forearm badly while trimming thorny bushes. She showed me the scratch — it was bleeding. I told her to clean it. She didn’t mention the assault until later. I don’t know Rohan Kapoor personally, but I’ve seen him around. I don’t know why his DNA is under her nails — maybe it’s from the gardening scratch? She didn’t tell me about the blue jacket. I think she was confused after the trauma.
